rule: Extraction is included in comprehensive dental — cannot bill separately
Scaling is a component of comprehensive dental cleaning
Physical exam is a component of wellness exam — cannot bill separately
WBC count is included in CBC panel
RBC count is included in CBC panel
Liver enzymes are included in comprehensive metabolic panel
Kidney function is included in comprehensive metabolic panel
Ovariectomy is a component of standard spay procedure
Orchiectomy is the standard neuter procedure — cannot bill as separate add-on
Suture placement is included in wound closure billing
Monitoring is included in general anesthesia billing
Individual views cannot be billed separately when a series is billed
Organ-specific views are included in complete abdominal ultrasound
Organ-specific views are included in complete abdominal ultrasound
Venipuncture is included in IV catheter placement
Nursing care is included in hospitalization daily rate
Vital signs monitoring is included in hospitalization daily rate
DHPP is a component of the core vaccine series — cannot bill separately
Giardia testing is included in comprehensive fecal parasite panel
Cytology is included when billed with ear flush procedure
Debridement is included in laceration repair billing
Local anesthesia is included in skin biopsy procedure cost
When cystocentesis is performed for urinalysis, the collection cannot be billed separately
IV access is included in chemotherapy administration billing
Surgical prep and draping are included in orthopedic surgery billing
Weight measurement is a component of wellness exam
Individual views are included in full-mouth dental radiograph series
Doppler assessment is the method used for blood pressure — not a separate billable item
Individual views are included in complete echocardiogram
When gastropexy is performed during exploratory, the exploratory is included
